patch:
diff --git a/asgiref/testing.py b/asgiref/testing.py
index d6ccee5..0299130 100644
--- a/asgiref/testing.py
+++ b/asgiref/testing.py
@@ -40,7 +40,7 @@ class ApplicationCommunicator:
             # are not "leaked" into the application which would normally begin with
             # an empty context. In Python >= 3.11 this could also be written as:
             # asyncio.create_task(..., context=contextvars.Context())
-            self._future = contextvars.Context().run(
+            self._future = contextvars.copy_context().run(
                 asyncio.create_task,
                 self.application(
                     self.scope, self.input_queue.get, self.output_queue.put
@@ -58,7 +58,7 @@ class ApplicationCommunicator:
                     await self.future
                     self.future.result()
                 except asyncio.CancelledError:
-                    pass
+                    await asyncio.sleep(0)
         finally:
             if not self.future.done():
                 self.future.cancel()
@@ -134,4 +134,4 @@ class ApplicationCommunicator:
             if not self.output_queue.empty():
                 return False
             await asyncio.sleep(interval)
-        return self.output_queue.empty()
+        return self.output_queue.empty()
\ No newline at end of file
